name: Source Fidelity review for Model Choice and Student-Simulation Validity Update bundle
summary: Accepted. The three sources are primary arXiv or ACL Anthology records with full-text PDFs verified and section-level locators. The staged numeric summaries for Do et al. and Martynova et al. are traceable to extracted full text, while Yuan et al. is correctly marked not_applicable for numeric extraction.

findings.claim_or_issue: The staged source records use primary landing pages and PDFs from arXiv and ACL Anthology.
findings.why_it_matters: The model-choice update should not depend on secondary paper pages or search snippets.
findings.recommended_action: Keep the full-text access metadata and source locators as staged.
